info.name: PayFlow - Complete API Collection (with AI & Fraud)
info.description:
Complete PayFlow API collection.

4 Application Services:
  • payment-service    :8081
  • fraud-detection    :8083
  • inquiry-service    :8085
  • ai-service (Spring AI) :8087

6 Folders | ~60 requests | Full test scripts

Set OPENAI_API_KEY env var before starting ai-service.

request.description: Check if Payment Service is running

exec: pm.test('Status is FRAUD_CHECK or PENDING', function() {

request.description: Send a small payment - should be APPROVED by fraud detection
Send a high value payment over 10000 EUR - should be flagged for REVIEW

body.raw:
{
  "senderId": "user-001",
  "receiverId": "user-003",
  "amount": 75000.00,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "description": "Very high value payment - should be REJECTED"
}

request.description: Send a very high value payment over 50000 EUR - should be REJECTED

body.raw:
{
  "senderId": "blocked-user-001",
  "receiverId": "user-002",
  "amount": 100.00,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "description": "Payment from blacklisted user - should be REJECTED with score 1.0"
}

request.description: Payment from a blacklisted sender - fraud score 1.0, REJECTED

body.raw:
{
  "senderId": "user-001",
  "receiverId": "user-002",
  "amount": 100.00,
  "currency": "EURO",
  "description": "This should fail - currency must be 3 chars"
}

request.description: Should return 400 Bad Request - currency must be exactly 3 characters
Get a specific payment by UUID - uses the ID saved from the create request
Get all payments for a specific sender

item.name: Get Payment by ID - Not Found

request.description: Should return 404 Not Found

item.name: 02 - Inquiry Service
item.description: Inquiry Service endpoints (port 8085) - search and retrieve payment history

request.description: Get all payments with pagination - page 0, 10 results per page
Get a specific payment by UUID
Get all payments sent by user-001
Get payments from user-001 that are in FRAUD_CHECK status
Get payments with amount between 100 and 5000
Full text search in payment description
Get all payments created in 2026
Advanced search - filter by sender AND currency
Advanced search with all filters combined
Get overall payment statistics - total count, amounts, by status
Get payment statistics for a specific sender

item.name: 03 - Fraud Detection Service
item.description:
Fraud Detection Service — async Kafka-driven rule engine.
Operates via Kafka events; exposes actuator + Swagger endpoints only.

request.description: Liveness check for the Fraud Detection Service
Spring Actuator health — shows DB, Kafka, Redis component status
List all available Micrometer metrics for fraud-detection-service
Prometheus-format metrics — same endpoint Prometheus scrapes every 15s
Check consumer lag on payment.initiated topic. Value near 0 = healthy processing

item.name: 04 - End-to-End Flow (Payment + Inquiry)
item.description: Complete end-to-end test flow - run these in order

item.name: Step 2 - Wait 2 seconds then Get Payment Status

request.description: Wait 2 seconds after Step 1 for fraud detection to process, then check status
Verify the same payment is visible in the Inquiry Service
Verify overall stats have updated with the new payment

item.name: 05 - AI Service (Spring AI)
item.description:
PayFlow AI Service — 6 endpoints powered by Spring AI 1.0.0-M6 + OpenAI GPT-4o-mini.

Requires OPENAI_API_KEY set in the service environment.
Set ai_service_url variable to http://localhost:8087

request.description: Liveness check — no auth required

exec: pm.test('AI service running', () => pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include('AI Service is running'));

request.description:
AI explains a REJECTED blacklist decision.
Spring AI pattern: PromptTemplate + BeanOutputConverter
Expect: riskLevel=CRITICAL, explanation + customerGuidance + complianceNote

body.raw:
{
  "paymentId": "{{payment_id}}",
  "senderId": "blocked-user-001",
  "amount": 100.0,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "decision": "REJECTED",
  "score": 1.0,
  "triggeredRules": [
    "BLACKLIST_RULE"
  ],
  "rawReason": "Sender blocked-user-001 is on the static blacklist"
}

request.description:
AI explains a REVIEW decision for a high-value payment.
Expect: riskLevel=HIGH or MEDIUM

body.raw:
{
  "paymentId": "{{payment_id}}",
  "senderId": "user-001",
  "amount": 15000.0,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "decision": "REVIEW",
  "score": 0.55,
  "triggeredRules": [
    "AMOUNT_RULE"
  ],
  "rawReason": "Transaction amount EUR 15000.00 exceeds high value threshold"
}

exec: pm.test('Risk level is HIGH or MEDIUM', () => pm.expect(['HIGH','MEDIUM']).to.include(r.riskLevel));

request.description: Multi-rule REJECTED payment — tests combined rule explanation

body.raw:
{
  "paymentId": "{{payment_id}}",
  "senderId": "user-003",
  "amount": 75000.0,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "decision": "REJECTED",
  "score": 0.95,
  "triggeredRules": [
    "AMOUNT_RULE",
    "VELOCITY_RULE"
  ],
  "rawReason": "Transaction amount EUR 75000.00 exceeds very high value threshold; Velocity limit exceeded"
}

request.description: AI explains an APPROVED low-risk payment — positive messaging test

Pre-submission risk check for a small payment.
Spring AI pattern: .entity(PaymentRiskResponse.class)
Expect: LOW risk, APPROVED prediction

Pre-submission risk check for EUR 15,000 payment.
Expect: HIGH risk, REVIEW prediction

Pre-submission check for EUR 75,000 payment to unknown receiver.
Expect: CRITICAL risk, REJECTED prediction

Risk assessment for a known blacklisted sender.
Expect: CRITICAL, REJECTED

Start a chat session — ask about fraud rules.
Spring AI pattern: MessageChatMemoryAdvisor
SessionId persists conversation memory.

Follow-up question using same session — tests MessageChatMemoryAdvisor.
The AI remembers the previous question about BLACKLIST_RULE.

New session — asks about velocity limits.
SessionId is null so a new conversation is started.

item.name: Chat - Ask why payment is in FRAUD_CHECK

request.description: Customer support scenario — payment stuck in FRAUD_CHECK

query.value: Explain the PayFlow fraud detection rules in detail

request.description:
Streams the AI response token-by-token via Server-Sent Events.
Spring AI pattern: .stream().content() -> Flux<String>

Note: Postman shows SSE as a single body. Use curl for real streaming:
curl -N "http://localhost:8087/api/v1/ai/chat/stream?message=Hello"

Portfolio with ~3% rejection rate — expect HEALTHY status.
Spring AI pattern: PromptTemplate (12 vars via HashMap) + .entity()
Portfolio with 20% rejection rate — expect ALERT or CRITICAL

Use the output from GET /api/v1/inquiry/stats directly as input here.
Tip: Run 'Get Overall Statistics' first, copy the response body, paste here.

AI generates a behavioural profile for a trusted sender.
Spring AI pattern: .user(lambda).param() — named parameter injection.
Expect: riskProfile=TRUSTED or STANDARD

Profile for a high-risk sender with many rejections.
Expect: riskProfile=HIGH_RISK or ELEVATED
Profile for a new user with minimal transaction history

item.name: 06 - End-to-End AI + Payment Flow
item.description:
Complete flow: AI risk check → create payment → fraud result → AI explanation → insights
Run requests in order. Steps 1-5 build on each other.

request.description: STEP 1: Ask AI to assess risk before submitting the payment
STEP 2: Submit the actual payment. Saves payment_id for subsequent steps.

exec: console.log('Payment created:', r.id, '| Initial status:', r.status);

item.name: Step 3 - Wait and Check Fraud Result (poll status)

request.description:
STEP 3: Wait 3-5 seconds after Step 2, then run this to check fraud result.
Status should have moved from FRAUD_CHECK to APPROVED/REVIEW/REJECTED.

exec: console.log('Payment status:', r.status, '| Fraud score:', r.fraudScore);

item.name: Step 4 - AI Explains the Fraud Decision

request.description:
STEP 4: Feed the real fraud result from Step 3 into the AI for explanation.
Replace 'decision' with the actual status from Step 3 if needed.

body.raw:
{
  "paymentId": "{{payment_id}}",
  "senderId": "e2e-user-001",
  "amount": 12000.0,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "decision": "{{e2e_final_status}}",
  "score": 0.55,
  "triggeredRules": [
    "AMOUNT_RULE"
  ],
  "rawReason": "Transaction amount EUR 12000.00 exceeds high value threshold"
}

request.description: STEP 5: Verify the payment is visible and has correct final status in Inquiry Service

exec: console.log('Inquiry status:', r.status, '| Fraud score:', r.fraudScore);

item.name: Step 6 - Get Stats and Feed to AI Insights

request.description: STEP 6: Get latest portfolio stats. Copy the response and use it as input for the AI Insights endpoint.

exec: console.log('NEXT: Copy this response body and POST to /api/v1/ai/insights');
